description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on every pull request to the main branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing on different environments including Ubuntu x64 with Clang and GCC, macOS x64 and universal with Clang, and Windows x64 and arm64 with MSVC and ClangCL. Each job should check out the repository, build the project in release and debug modes, run system tests and unit tests, and upload binaries as artifacts.
